name: Spaghetti & Meat Balls by Little Joe's in La.
recipeIngredient: Ground beef, ground pork, ground veal (1 pound total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook minced onion, bell pepper, celery, and garlic in oil until vegetables are tender.
2. Add tomatoes, liquid, tomato puree, basil, oregano, and bay leaf to the sauce; simmer.
3. Combine meat ingredients and mix well. Form into 1-inch balls and fry on medium heat until lightly browned.
4. Place meatballs into the simmering sauce.
